# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. Include OS and data disks with default settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting VMs running - we'll add disk encryption and security features in phase 2 after validating the architecture.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

# Starter ARM template for deploying Azure Virtual Machines running our web application. 
parameters:
  vmName: 
    type: string
    default: myVM
  location: 
    type: string
    default: West Europe
  adminUsername: 
    type: string
    default: TestUser
  authenticationType: 
    type: string
    allowedValues:
      - password
      - sshPublicKey
    default: password
resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines
    name: '@parameters("vmName")'
    apiVersion: '2019-12-01'
    location: '@parameters("location")'
    properties:
      hardwareProfile:
        vmSize: Standard_DS1_v2
      osProfile:
        computerName: '@parameters("vmName")'
        adminUsername: '@parameters("adminUsername")'
        adminPasswordOrKey: TestPassword # replace with KeyVault reference if using sshPublicKey authentication
      storageProfile:
        imageReference:
          publisher: MicrosoftWindowsServer
          offer: WindowsServer
          sku: 2016-Datacenter
          version: latest
        osDisk:
          name: '@parameters("vmName")'
          caching: ReadWrite
          createOption: FromImage
          managedDisk:
            storageAccountType: Premium_LRS
        dataDisks:
          - diskSizeGB: 1023
            lun: 0
            caching: None
            createOption: Empty
            managedDisk:
              storageAccountType: StandardSSD_LRS
